title: verbascum × subantinori
intro: Verbascum × subalpinum is a hybrid plant, also known as the Yellow Mullein, which is a cross between Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum lychnitis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × subalpinum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
